initial_outreach:
Subject: AI workforce training — 68% interview rate in 30 days

Hi [name],

I'm an AI practitioner who runs structured workforce training programs for job seekers at America's Job Centers. The program I've developed covers AI-assisted resume targeting, cover letter drafting, interview preparation, skills gap analysis, and job search optimization — all with practical, measured outcomes.

The result from recent pilots: 68% of participants secured at least one interview within 30 days, and 91% reported ongoing use of AI tools in their job search a month later. For workforce directors evaluating training investments, that interview rate directly translates into reduced time-to-placement — a key performance metric.

The program is structured, reproducible, and designed for scale. A single 2-hour session leaves each attendee with a tailored resume, cover letter, interview question set, and a skills gap report — all produced during the session, not as homework.

I would like to discuss bringing this to [center] as part of your workforce training calendar. Let me know if a brief conversation makes sense.

Best,
Phil
aiworx4me.com
outreach@aiworx4me.com
